## Summary

Describe the problem, the user-visible outcome, and any related issues.

## Contract, API, and database changes

- [ ] No public Contract, API, or migration changes
- [ ] Breaking-change impact and fresh-install requirements are documented below

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Python Ruff, mypy, and pytest
- [ ] Relevant remote datastore, browser, and container checks

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No Provider keys, prompts, or model responses are stored or logged
- [ ] The implementation preserves application isolation and authorization boundaries

## Documentation and compatibility

- [ ] User-facing behavior and breaking changes are documented
- [ ] Examples and tests use only synthetic identifiers and documentation addresses
